evidence: "I love the Endeavour series. They are great stories, without all of the explosions, blood and guts of US series."
"I really enjoyed the series. It was the history we all learned in school, but it was great to review it as a series."
"It was just OK., I thought the acting was pretty well done."
"It is a series I can watch and enjoy, without cars blowing up and everyone jumping into bed with everyone."
"The acting was very good. It really held our attention."
"I am a great fan of Morgan Freeman, and he certainly was great in this movie."
"I am a fan of Kevin Spacey, so of course I enjoyed his role."
"The writers of this program, make the people in the series so like people we all know."
"I thought the acting was good and the scenery was beautiful."
"It really showed how women who were forced to give up their babies never really forget them."
"I never had the experience, but know a mothers love is forever."

summary: The user enjoys drama and historical narratives, favoring slower-paced stories with strong character development. They appreciate high-quality acting and emotional depth, often resonating with themes of love and personal connection.
